description: Install dependencies and verify the project baseline builds and passes type-check/lint
steps: Run 'pnpm install' in /projects/sandbox/sump-it to install all dependencies
Run 'pnpm type-check' to verify TypeScript compiles without errors
Run 'pnpm lint:lenient' to verify lint baseline (strict may have existing issues)
findings: pnpm install and pnpm type-check both pass cleanly. lint:lenient fails due to circular JSON structure in ESLint/Next.js config (pre-existing issue unrelated to our changes). node_modules installed successfully with pnpm v10.28.1.
